title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's win impacts their tournament standing and chances for a higher seed in the upcoming NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeated NC State 81- in the ACC Tournament, led by Malik Thomas with 16 points and Thijs De Ridder with 15 points.
charlotte_impact: This victory is crucial for Virginia's momentum and potential advancement in the ACC Tournament.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game determines which team advances further in the ACC Tournament.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack face the No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Provides insight into the expected outcome of the game and betting odds.

title: Morganton Man Killed in I-40 Rollover Crash
summary: Lee Glover died in a rollover crash on I-40 in Iredell County after his vehicle ran off the road.
charlotte_impact: Fatal accidents raise concerns about road safety and driving conditions in the area.

title: Tornado Confirmed to Hit Charlotte Warehouse
summary: The National Weather Service confirms an EF0 tornado struck a warehouse in northeast Charlotte during Monday's storms.

title: Man Arrested After Food Lion Parking Lot Standoff

title: Teen Charged with Killing Mother's Boyfriend in Lancaster County
summary: A Lancaster County teen is charged with fatally shooting his mother's boyfriend during an argument.

title: Protests Over Silfab Solar Plant in York County

summary: Freezing temperatures are expected each night through Thursday morning.

title: False Active Shooter Call Prompts Lockdown at Cleveland County High School
